CREATE TABLE integers (a INT, b INT);
SELECT a | b AS bitwise_or_result FROM integers;
SELECT (a | b) | 8 AS nested_or FROM integers;
SELECT (SELECT a FROM integers WHERE a > 10) | (SELECT b FROM integers WHERE b < 5) AS nested_subquery_or;
CREATE TABLE more_integers (c INT, d INT);
SELECT i.a | i.b AS or_result FROM integers i JOIN more_integers m ON i.a = m.c;
SELECT (i.a | m.d) | (i.b | 10) AS complex_bitwise_or FROM integers i, more_integers m WHERE i.a > 10 AND m.d < 20;
SELECT MAX(a | b) AS max_bitwise_or FROM integers;
SELECT SUM(a | b) AS total_bitwise_or FROM integers;
